description:
Refer our platform to others and earn extra rewards. For every company that registers using your referral link and verifies its phone number, you’ll receive {{pointsReferralCompany}} points.

A company that creates an account not previously registered in our system will receive a 30-day free trial with the {{planFreeTrialCompany}} plan.

Additionally, for every user who joins through your referral and verifies their phone number (not previously registered in our system), you’ll earn another {{pointsReferralUser}} points on your account.
information: Simply share your unique code or QR code with someone who wants to create an account. This way, you can benefit from every successful referral.
noActiveReferral: You don’t have an active referral program. 😓
title: Earn more with referrals!
titleCode: Code to enter manually on the registration page
